summary: Completed issue 113 locally. SpecBridge now has a deterministic `issue-to-merge-github` operator command that defaults to dry-run, records explicit GitHub connector actions for issue creation or verification, PR opening or update, CI wait, policy-gated merge, issue closure, and post-merge memory, and blocks apply mode unless force, explicit confirmation, and declared gate evidence are present.
validations: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/specbridge.ps1 issue-to-merge-github -TaskId issue-113-bounded-github-mutation-operator -Title "Add bounded GitHub mutation operator mode" -Goal "Add a deterministic bounded issue-to-merge GitHub mutation operator surface with dry-run default, explicit connector action envelope, apply evidence gates, docs, tests, and audit evidence." -RelatedIssue https://github.com/yagooyarzabaldev-ops/specbridge/issues/113 -OutputPath .specbridge/issue-to-merge-runs/issue-113-bounded-github-mutation-operator.github-mutation-run.json -Force: passed
policy_result: Passed locally. The command is dry-run by default, records bounded connector actions, performs no GitHub calls in dry-run, and apply mode is blocked unless force, explicit confirmation, and declared local/GitHub gate evidence are present. No secrets, production, billing, auth, authorization, database, dependency installation, CI/CD security, or deployment scope was changed.
risk_result: Medium risk because the local CLI product surface now defines bounded GitHub mutation operations. Risk is bounded by dry-run default behavior, explicit operation selection, apply evidence gates, focused CLI tests, documentation, audit evidence, security gate, review gate, and GitHub CI as external authority.
unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
A future live operator run should compare the connector action envelope with real GitHub issue, PR, CI, merge, and issue closure evidence.
merge_status: Pending pull request, GitHub CI, review gate, security gate, and policy-gated merge.
